name: knowledge_lifecycle
description: Knowledge recording and lifecycle workflow. Classify → write → check promote.

nodes.description: Classify incoming knowledge: official doc → skills/external, inference → dynamic. Read checklist and report classification basis.
Write knowledge to shared/kb/dynamic/ with proper format. New entries in learning_notes.md MUST include <!-- status: active --> marker.
Sync dynamic KB changes to kb_index.db after writing
Check if dynamic KB has enough validated entries to suggest /promote
